chapter.label: Tale 22
chapter.title: The Life Of Another Elder Named Conon

paragraphs.text: In the community of our holy father Theodosios the Archimandrite there was an elder named Conon, a native of Cilicia. This is the rule of life which he maintained for thirty-five years: he partook of bread and water once a week, he worked unceasingly and he never went out of the church.
23, THE LIFE OF THEODQULOS THE MONK We saw another elder in that same monastery, a former soldier
named Theodoulos who fasted every day, never wore shoes and never slept lying down.*
